# Dashboard Module

Dashboard member dan admin memakai shared marketplace shell.

- Member dashboard menyediakan akses profile, order, notification, dan consultation.
- Admin dashboard menyediakan KPI operasional, consultation queue, order monitoring, dan product management.
- Order monitoring mencakup filter, detail invoice snapshot, serta fulfillment berurutan.
- Product management mencakup create, edit, upload media, featured, stock/status, preview, dan archive.
- News management tersedia sebagai section khusus pada Owner Tool Builder sesuai boundary credential owner.
- Member management admin tetap menjadi scope lanjutan Phase 8.
